brand.name: Hikaya
brand.description: All-in-one platform for Gulf creative professionals.

home.subheadline: Photographers, videographers, designers, and editors. Showcase your work, get hired, run your studio, deliver to clients, and sell what you make — without ever leaving the platform.
home.trustedBy: Built for the way the Gulf works

valueProps.portfolioBody: Editorial layouts that put the work first. Masonry, full-width spreads, or showreels — your call.
valueProps.hireBody: Clients send you inquiries. You apply to public job briefs. Conversations stay in one thread, with a paper trail.
valueProps.studioBody: Bookings, contracts, quotes, invoices, payouts, and team management — purpose-built for creative businesses.
valueProps.deliverBody: Pixieset-grade client galleries with favorites, downloads, and watermark control. Replaces WeTransfer over WhatsApp.

auth.signInSubtitle: Pick up where you left off — your studio, your clients, your work.
auth.signUpSubtitle: It takes a minute. Build a portfolio or hire your first creative — both start here.
auth.acceptTerms: I agree to Hikaya's <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.panelBody: Hikaya is the all-in-one platform Gulf creatives use to showcase work, get hired, run their studio, deliver to clients, and sell what they make.
auth.demoCredentials: Try <email>noor@hikaya.sa</email> / <password>password123</password> for the creator view, or <email>client@hikaya.sa</email> for the client view.
auth.demoNote: Backend is mocked in-memory; data resets on server restart.

errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.

me.title: Your account
me.subtitle: This is your account home. The dashboard, portfolio editor, bookings, and messages all branch from here.
me.nextBody: We're currently scaffolding feature surfaces. Auth is the first slice — portfolio, discover, and the studio CRM are queued up.

studio.title: Studio dashboard
studio.headline: The business side,
studio.subtitle: Bookings, clients, and revenue in a single command center. Everything below is mocked — wire to @hikaya/api when you're ready.
studio.mockNote: Mock data — bookings + clients live in memory and reset on server restart.

upcoming.title: Upcoming
upcoming.empty: No bookings in the next two weeks. Quiet stretch — use it.

inquiry.title: Send an inquiry
inquiry.subtitle: Tell the creator about your project. They'll see it instantly and have 48 hours to respond.
inquiry.panelBody: Inquiries on Hikaya stay on Hikaya. The creator gets a notification, the conversation lives in one thread, and the paper trail is yours forever.

form.locationDetailHint: e.g. "Edge of the World, 2-day trip" or "Corniche, sunset window".
form.descriptionHint: 20+ characters. Mood, deliverables, anything they should know upfront.
form.errorCreatorNotFound: We couldn't find that creator. They may have removed their profile.

inquiries.title: Your inquiries
inquiries.subtitle: Every project request you've sent. Status updates appear here in real time once you've connected an account.
inquiries.empty: You haven't sent any inquiries yet.
inquiries.emptyHint: Find someone whose work you love, then tell them about your project.
inquiries.sentBody: We've notified the creator. They have 48 hours to respond — you'll see status updates here.

discover.title: Discover creatives
discover.headline: Photographers, designers, filmmakers —
discover.subtitle: Curated creatives across Saudi Arabia. Filter by city, discipline, or availability — or just browse and let the work do the talking.
discover.count: {count, plural, =0 {No creatives match} =1 {1 creative} other {# creatives}} on Hikaya
discover.empty: No creatives match these filters yet.
discover.emptyHint: Try clearing a filter, or check back soon — we're onboarding more talent every week.
